name: JosiCat Cat Wet Food – Salmon Pâté Alutray 100g
description: Crafted with high-quality ingredients and no unnecessary extras, JosiCat Salmon Pâté is enriched with essential vitamins and nutrients to support your cat’s overall wellbeing. Vitamin E helps protect cells from oxidative stress, while vitamin D3 contributes to healthy bones and vitality. Added biotin, zinc, and copper help maintain healthy skin and promote a shiny, glossy coat. The recipe also includes prebiotic inulin, which can help support healthy digestion and balanced gut flora. Packed in a convenient 100g alutray, this wet food is ideal for fresh and easy feeding every day. Key Benefits Complete wet food for adult cats Delicious ASC salmon flavour in a smooth pâté texture Supports healthy hydration with high moisture content Enriched with vitamins E and D3 for overall wellbeing Helps maintain healthy skin and a glossy coat Contains prebiotic inulin for digestive support Convenient 100g alutray portion for freshness and easy feeding Composition Meat and animal derivatives, fish and fish derivatives (ASC salmon 4.0%), minerals, derivatives of vegetable origin (inulin 0.40%). Analytical Constituents Protein: 11.0% Fat Content: 4.5% Crude Fibre: 0.3% Crude Ash: 2.0% Feeding Guide Cat Weight Daily Feeding Amount 3 kg Approx. 230 g 4 kg Approx. 280 g 5 kg Approx. 330 g 6 kg Approx. 370 g Feed amounts may vary depending on your cat’s activity level and additional food intake. Always provide fresh drinking water. After opening, refrigerate at 2–6°C and serve at room temperature within 24 hours.
